## CryptoUtils.decryptFile() function

Decrypts an [encrypted file](./ts-extras.cryptoutils.iencryptedfile.md) and returns the JSON content.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function decryptFile<TPayload extends JsonValue = JsonValue>(file: IEncryptedFile<unknown>, key: Uint8Array, cryptoProvider: ICryptoProvider, payloadConverter?: Converter<TPayload>): Promise<Result<TPayload>>;
```

</td></tr>

Promise&lt;Result&lt;TPayload&gt;&gt;

`Success` with decrypted content, or `Failure` with an error.
